pr.title: fix: make review queue banner tap open drawer on mobile
pr.body: ## What changed - added a dedicated `handleOpenConsumerReviewQueue` callback in `src/app/travel-assistant/page.tsx` - wired the yellow review-queue banner in the Reservations tab to use this callback for both `onClick` and `onTouchEnd` - added `preventDefault`/`stopPropagation` handling in the touch path to avoid parent pull-to-refresh touch handlers swallowing taps ## How to test - open Travel Assistant on mobile viewport - go to Reservations tab with at least one review queue item - tap the yellow banner (`...waiting in your review queue — tap to review now`) - confirm review drawer opens reliably - run `npm run lint && npm run build` ## Checklist - [x] lint passes - [ ] tests pass - [x] build passes - [x] no travel insurance content added
pr.author: jpro99
